title: helianthemum × siberi
intro: Helianthemum × siberi, also known as Rockrose or Siberian Rockrose, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Helianthemum genus and is commonly found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum × siberi lie in its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum × siberi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
